SEARCH:

程序包org.graphstream.stream.rmi的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • 所有程序包

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.rmi.server.RemoteObject (implements java.rmi.Remote, java.io.Serializable)
      • java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
        • java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
          • org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMISink (implements org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMIAdapterOut, org.graphstream.stream.Sink)
          • org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMISource (implements org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMIAdapterIn, org.graphstream.stream.Source)

接口分层结构

  • java.rmi.Remote
    • org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMIAdapterIn
    • org.graphstream.stream.rmi.RMIAdapterOut
